commands.name: create

options.name: --assign
options.description: Username to assign the issue to

options.name: --commit
options.description: Commit changes to git after creating issue

options.name: --description
options.description: Issue description

options.name: --execution-mode
options.description:
Execution mode for child issues: series (default), 
parallel

options.name: --issues
options.description:
Path to a JSONL issues file to use instead of the default 
.fleece/issues_*.jsonl

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON

options.name: --json-verbose
options.description: Output as JSON with all metadata fields

options.name: --linked-issues
options.description: Comma-separated linked issue IDs

options.name: --parent-issues
options.description:
Comma-separated parent issue IDs with optional sort order 
(e.g., abc123,def456:bbb)

options.name: --priority
options.description: Priority 1-5 (1=highest)

options.name: --push
options.description:
Push to remote after committing (implies 
--commit)

options.name: --status
options.description: Initial status (default: open)

options.name: --tags
options.description:
Comma-separated tags (no whitespace allowed in 
tags)

options.name: --title
options.description: Issue title (required)

options.name: --type
options.description:
Issue type: task, bug, chore, feature, idea, verify 
(required)

options.name: --working-branch
options.description:
Working branch ID (valid Git branch name characters 
only)

commands.description:
Create a new issue. Run without options to open an interactive 
editor with a YAML template.

options.name: --all
options.description: Show all issues including all statuses

options.name: --assigned
options.description: Filter by assignee

options.name: --issues
options.description:
Path to a JSONL issues file to use instead of the default 
.fleece/issues_*.jsonl

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON

options.name: --json-verbose
options.description: Output as JSON with all metadata fields

options.name: --linked-pr
options.description:
Filter by linked PR number (checks hsp-linked-pr 
tags)

options.name: --me
options.description: Filter to issues assigned to current user

options.name: --next
options.description:
Display as a bottom-up task graph showing approximate task 
ordering

options.name: --one-line
options.description:
Output each issue on a single line: <id> 
<status> <type> <title>

options.name: --priority
options.description: Filter by priority

options.name: --search
options.description:
Search using query syntax (e.g., 'status:open type:bug 
login')

options.name: --status
options.description:
Filter by status: draft, open, progress, review, complete, 
archived, closed

options.name: --strict
options.description:
Fail with exit code 1 if schema warnings are 
detected

options.name: --sync-status
options.description:
Show git sync status for each issue (~=synced, +=committed,
*=local)

options.name: --tag
options.description: Filter by tag (can specify multiple times)

options.name: --tag-key
options.description:
Filter by keyed tag (e.g., project=frontend). Can specify 
multiple times.

options.name: --tree
options.description:
Display issues in a tree view based on parent-child 
relationships

options.name: --tree-root
options.description:
Scope tree view to descendants of this issue ID (implies 
--tree)

options.name: --type
options.description:
Filter by type: task, bug, chore, feature, idea, 
verify

commands.name: edit

options.name: --assign
options.description: New assignee username

options.name: --description
options.description: New description

options.name: --execution-mode
options.description:
Execution mode for child issues: series, 
parallel

options.name: --issues
options.description:
Path to a JSONL issues file to use instead of the default 
.fleece/issues_*.jsonl

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON

options.name: --json-verbose
options.description: Output as JSON with all metadata fields

options.name: --linked-issues
options.description: Replace linked issue IDs (comma-separated)

options.name: --priority
options.description: New priority 1-5

options.name: --status
options.description:
New status: draft, open, progress, review, complete, 
archived, closed

options.name: --tags
options.description:
Replace tags (comma-separated, no whitespace allowed in 
tags)

options.name: --title
options.description: New title

options.name: --type
options.description:
New type: task, bug, chore, feature, idea, 
verify

options.name: --working-branch
options.description:
New working branch ID (valid Git branch name characters 
only)

commands.description:
Edit an existing issue. Run with only an ID to open an 
interactive editor with the issue's current values.

options.name: --issues
options.description:
Path to a JSONL issues file to use instead of the default 
.fleece/issues_*.jsonl

commands.name: clean

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Show what would be cleaned without making 
changes

options.name: --include-archived
options.description: Also clean issues with Archived status

options.name: --include-closed
options.description: Also clean issues with Closed status

options.name: --include-complete
options.description: Also clean issues with Complete status

options.name: --issues
options.description:
Path to a JSONL issues file to use instead of the default 
.fleece/issues_*.jsonl

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON

options.name: --no-strip-refs
options.description:
Do not strip references to cleaned issues from remaining 
issues

commands.description:
Permanently remove deleted issues and create tombstone 
records

commands.name: prime

arguments.name: topic
arguments.description:
Topic to display help for (hierarchy, commands, statuses, 
sync, json, questions, next, tree, merge)

commands.description: Print LLM instructions for issue tracking

commands.name: question

options.name: --answer
options.description: Answer a question (use with --text)

options.name: --ask
options.description: Ask a new question

options.name: --issues
options.description:
Path to a JSONL issues file to use instead of the default 
.fleece/issues_*.jsonl

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON

options.name: --list
options.description: List all questions on the issue

options.name: --text
options.description: Answer text (use with --answer)

examples: question abc123 --ask What is the expected behavior?
question abc123 --answer Q12345 --text It should return a 200 status

options.name: --issues
options.description:
Path to a JSONL issues file to use instead of the default 
.fleece/issues_*.jsonl

options.name: --json
options.description: Output results as JSON

options.name: --ci
options.description:
Allow CI to run (omits [skip ci] from commit 
message)

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON

options.name: --message
options.description:
Commit message (default: 'Update fleece 
issues')

options.name: --push
options.description: Push to remote after committing

commands.name: dependency

options.name: --after
options.description: Place after this sibling in sort order

options.name: --before
options.description: Place before this sibling in sort order

options.name: --child
options.description: Child issue ID

options.name: --first
options.description: Place at the beginning of the sort order

options.name: --issues
options.description:
Path to a JSONL issues file to use instead of the default 
.fleece/issues_*.jsonl

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON

options.name: --last
options.description: Place at the end of the sort order

options.name: --parent
options.description: Parent issue ID

options.name: --remove
options.description: Remove the dependency instead of adding it

commands.description:
Add or remove parent-child dependency between 
issues

options.name: --one-line

commands.description:

commands.name: config

options.name: --get
options.description: Get a configuration value by key

options.description: Output as JSON

options.name: --list
options.description:
List all settings with their values and 
sources

options.name: --path
options.description: Show the path to the settings file

options.name: --set
options.description:
Set a configuration value (format: key=value). Use empty 
value to clear.
